title: [codereview-1] spec/02-physical-link.md: CCP-16 section missing table for metrics/signaling, arbitrary weights, no cross-links to routing or bufferbloat, incomplete integration details with da2q
description: Review pass 1 of CCP-16.1 spec update found several issues with completeness, consistency with existing specs (ETX in 05-routing, bufferbloat appendix), and formatting. Needs tables, precise references, rationale for algorithm params. Tagged codereview.
